name: Chile Relleno Torta
recipeIngredient: 4 ounces canned diced green chilies, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F.
2. Mix the grated cheeses and spread them evenly in a buttered 10-inch pie plate.
3. Beat the eggs, then gradually add the flour while continuing to beat.
4. Slowly incorporate the half-and-half into the mixture. If it is lumpy, strain it through a fine-mesh sieve.
5. Pour the egg mixture over the cheeses in the pie plate.
6. Carefully spoon the diced green chilies over the surface of the egg mixture.
7. Spoon the picante sauce over all of the contents.
8. Bake for about 45 minutes or until the center is set.
9. Makes 8-10 servings.
